case_title: JONATHAN GERMAIN VS. MICRO-TRACERS INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION FOR ORDER APPROVING STIPULATION OF SETTLEMENT OF PLAINTIFF JONATHAN GERMAINS CLAIMS UNDER THE CALIFORNIA LABOR CODE PRIVATE ATTORNEYS GENERAL ACT (PAGA) (TRANSACTION ID # 66162933) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERMAIN, JONATHAN , AN INDIVIDUAL
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-16-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66392965) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERMAIN, JONATHAN , AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302: PLAINTIFF JONATHAN GERMAIN'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT CLAIMS UNDER THE CALIFORNIA LABOR CODE PRIVATE ATTORNEYS GENERAL ACT (PAGA) IS IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 16, 2020 AT 9:30 AM IN LAW AND MOTION DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS BY MONDAY, DECEMBER 14, 2020 INCLUDING A REVISED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM

MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-10-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JONATHAN GERMAIN'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT CLAIMS UNDER THE CALIFORNIA LABOR CODE PRIVATE ATTORNEYS GENERAL ACT (PAGA). THE COURT HAS REVIEWED THE SUPPLEMENTAL HIGHMAN DECLARATION AND THE ATTACHED REVISED STIPULATION OF SETTLEMENT, AS WELL AS THE CONFIDENTIAL SETTLEMENT AND GENERAL RELEASE AGREEMENT. BASED ON THAT REVIEW, THE COURT HEREBY APPROVES THE REVISED STIPULATION OF SETTLEMENT OF PLAINTIFF JONATHAN GERMAIN'S CLAIMS UNDER THE PRIVATE ATTORNEYS GENERAL ACT (PAGA). ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CAUSES OF ACTION 1-11. THE 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER PAGA ISN'T DISMISSED. (TRANSACTION ID # 66339123)

Plaintiff Jonathan Germain'S Motion To Approve Settlement Claims Under The California Labor Code Private Attorneys General Act (Paga) [Per Ex Parte Order Filed 11/30/2020 - Supporting Papers To Be Filed By 12/7/2020]
Off Calendar Dec-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Jonathan Germain'S Motion To Approve Settlement Claims Under The California Labor Code Private Attorneys General Act (Paga)

The Court has reviewed the supplemental Highman declaration and the attached revised stipulation of settlement, as well as the confidential settlement and general release agreement. Based on that review, the Court hereby approves the revised stipulation of settlement of Plaintiff Jonathan Germain's claims under the Private Attorneys General Act (PAGA).

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Plaintiff Jonathan Germain'S Motion To Approve Settlement Claims Under The California Labor Code Private Attorneys General Act (Paga) [Per Ex Parte Order Filed 11/30/2020 - Supporting Papers To Be Filed By 12/7/2020]
Off Calendar Dec-10-2020 Continued To Dec-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM Video-conferencing:
Attorney, Bruce J. Highman of the law offices of [ ] ( ) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving/opposing party

Attorney, Jeffrey M. Curtiss of the law offices of [ ] (Tel: ; Email: jeff@jcurtisslaw.com) appears as counsel for defendant/moving/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides on record as reflected in the notes of the Certified Shorthand Reporter.

Plaintiff Jonathan Germain'S Motion To Approve Settlement Claims Under The California Labor Code Private Attorneys General Act (Paga) is is CONTINUED to December 16, 2020 at 9:30 AM in Law and Motion Department 302. Counsel for plaintiff to submit supplemental briefs by Monday, December 14, 2020 including a revised settlement agreement. The only change anticipated in the settlement agreement is the "Release" provision.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
